[attention-item-detail-navigation] [P2] Update dashboard-attention barrel to export new Sheet components
tasks.description:
Update the `dashboard-attention` feature module barrel file to export the three new Sheet components so `DashboardPage` (in `widgets/dashboard`) can import them.

## Implementation

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/index.ts`:

```typescript
/**
 * Dashboard attention feature — conditional attention zone for items needing user action.
 * Renders zero DOM when empty. Animates in/out with AnimatePresence.
 * Provides detail Sheets for dead letters, failed runs, and offline agents.
 *
 * @module features/dashboard-attention
 */
export { NeedsAttentionSection } from './ui/NeedsAttentionSection';
export { useAttentionItems } from './model/use-attention-items';
export type { AttentionItem } from './model/use-attention-items';
export { DeadLetterDetailSheet } from './ui/DeadLetterDetailSheet';
export { FailedRunDetailSheet } from './ui/FailedRunDetailSheet';
export { OfflineAgentDetailSheet } from './ui/OfflineAgentDetailSheet';
```

## Files Modified

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/index.ts` — add three new exports, update module TSDoc

## Acceptance Criteria

- `DeadLetterDetailSheet`, `FailedRunDetailSheet`, and `OfflineAgentDetailSheet` are importable from `@/layers/features/dashboard-attention`
- Existing exports (`NeedsAttentionSection`, `useAttentionItems`, `AttentionItem` type) are unchanged
- Module-level TSDoc is updated to mention the detail Sheets
- `pnpm typecheck` passes

tasks.subject: [attention-item-detail-navigation] [P3] Update use-attention-items to navigate via search params instead of Zustand panel state
tasks.description:
Replace the Zustand panel state calls (`setPulseOpen`, `setRelayOpen`, `setMeshOpen`) in `use-attention-items.ts` with TanStack Router search param navigation, so clicking "View" on attention items updates the URL instead of opening subsystem panels.

## Implementation

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/model/use-attention-items.ts`:

### Remove imports

Remove:
```typescript
import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model';
```

### Remove Zustand selectors

Remove these three lines from inside `useAttentionItems()`:
```typescript
const setRelayOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setRelayOpen);
const setMeshOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setMeshOpen);
const setPulseOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setPulseOpen);
```

### Update failed run action

Change from:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () => setPulseOpen(true),
},
```

To:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () =>
    navigate({
      to: '/',
      search: (prev) => ({ ...prev, detail: 'failed-run' as const, itemId: run.id }),
    }),
},
```

### Update dead letter action

Change from:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () => setRelayOpen(true),
},
```

To:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () =>
    navigate({
      to: '/',
      search: (prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        detail: 'dead-letter' as const,
        itemId: `${group.source}::${group.reason}`,
      }),
    }),
},
```

### Update offline agent action

Change from:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () => setMeshOpen(true),
},
```

To:
```typescript
action: {
  label: 'View \u2192',
  onClick: () =>
    navigate({
      to: '/',
      search: (prev) => ({ ...prev, detail: 'offline-agent' as const, itemId: 'offline' }),
    }),
},
```

### Update useMemo dependency array

Remove `setRelayOpen`, `setMeshOpen`, `setPulseOpen` from the dependency array. The final array should be:
```typescript
], [sessions, failedRuns, deadLetters, meshStatus, navigate]);
```

### Stalled session action — unchanged

The stalled session action already uses `navigate` to go to `/session`. No changes needed.

## Files Modified

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/model/use-attention-items.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- Failed run "View" action calls `navigate({ to: '/', search: ... })` with `detail: 'failed-run'` and `itemId: run.id`
- Dead letter "View" action calls `navigate` with `detail: 'dead-letter'` and `itemId: 'source::reason'`
- Offline agent "View" action calls `navigate` with `detail: 'offline-agent'` and `itemId: 'offline'`
- Stalled session "Open" action is unchanged (still navigates to `/session`)
- No `useAppStore` import remains in the file
- No `setRelayOpen`, `setMeshOpen`, `setPulseOpen` references remain in the file
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
